Sentry._comment: Leave blank to disable Sentry. Set via SENTRY_DSN env var in production. Get a DSN at https://sentry.io (free tier: 5k errors/month).

OpenTelemetry._comment: Configured via OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT and OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS env vars. Leave unset to disable. For Grafana Cloud: see /docs/observability.md.
